title: Workflow of Generating a KYC Report
summary: This skill outlines the workflow for generating a Know Your Customer (KYC) report, encompassing company website research, GLEIF/LEI lookup, and adverse media/news screening to build a foundational client profile.

root_steps.title: Company Website Research
root_steps.description: Gather information about the company from its official website, including business overview, products/services, leadership team, strategic priorities, geographic footprint, and regulatory disclosures.

root_steps.title: GLEIF / LEI Lookup
root_steps.description: Use the Global Legal Entity Identifier Foundation (GLEIF) database to pull the company’s Legal Entity Identifier (LEI), registered address, entity status, and ownership structure.

root_steps.title: Adverse Media / News Screening
root_steps.description: Conduct adverse media screening by searching news outlets and public filings for any negative news, sanctions, regulatory actions, or legal proceedings involving the company.
